resources.string: NFC is not available. You cannot test SteadySense patches with this device. Nevertheless, you can still run UI tests with fake patches.
The NFC function on the device is disabled. You can activate it in the settings.
NFC is available. Hold your device close to a SteadySense patch!
Unsupported NFC tag: An Exception occurred while processing this NFC tag. Try again with another NFC tag.
Patch activation succeeded! Expecting SW state transitions within the next seconds.... You should be able to read the first measurement in 1 minute.
Failed to activate the patch! An Exception occurred during the activation protocol. Scroll down to the bottom to see the current state of the patch.
